overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a fantasy game showing a medieval wooden pavilion where students in robes gather around tables. Sunlight filters through the open timber structure revealing a lush green landscape beyond the archway, while characters move about the stone-paved courtyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pavilion courtyard with study tables

agents.ego_description: stationary viewpoint observing students and activity within the timber pavilion

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking from right to left through the pavilion
student standing at wooden table examining items

entered.detail: large wooden beam structure with arched supports forming the roof and walls
light-colored stone tiles covering the ground surface
rustic wooden tables with benches where students gather
large arched opening leading to the green landscape outside
sunlit grassy terrain visible through the archway
green plants in containers along the left wall
dark wooden door with metal fixtures set into the back wall

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a fixed position inside a medieval-style timber pavilion, capturing students in dark robes as they move between wooden tables and benches. Sunlight streams through the open archway illuminating the stone floor, while the heavy wooden beams frame views of the lush green hills beyond. Characters wander through the space, some pausing at tables while others walk through the background doorway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic perspective within a medieval timber pavilion that frames a transition from the shadowed interior to the bright, natural world outside. It begins by capturing students in dark robes as they navigate between heavy wooden tables and benches on a stone-paved floor. As the camera holds its position, sunlight streams through the open archway, casting sharp highlights across the courtyard and illuminating the movement of characters passing through the background doorway. The scene then expands visually through the heavy wooden beams, which serve as a frame for the lush green hills stretching into the distance.
